title: Arcane Odyssey
description: a medium sized building and adventure pack
body:
**Arcane Odyssey** was inspired when the topic of mods was brought up while playing vanilla with a group of people.

as me and the group were hanging out one day wandering around a server we felt: "what if this was modded" and with out anyone asking i put together some mods that i felt they would like, spending some time to adjust the mods to fit with slightly weaker machines to preserve preformance.

added alot of building blocks with cool food alongside magic.

changing the players experience with just playing the game with the origins mod making your player have cool and custom abilities.

either to make the game easier or harder but still making game play more interesting and letting creativity flourish.

some mods included are: delight's, origins, essential.

Hope you enjoy playing this great game!
